  COUNT(DISTINCT(p.entry_method)) AS `metric__a_1865`,
  COUNT(DISTINCT(p.mt_gateway)) AS `metric__a_1866`
FROM pmt_txn_fact p
WHERE p.merchant_account_number = %s AND p.event_date >= 1775234672412
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
